bool level_save(int dis_level, int save_.brief: Determines whether a character successfully resists an effect based on their level difference.
bool level_save(int dis_level, int save_.details: This function calculates a saving chance percentage based on the difference between the character's dis_level and the save_level. It adjusts the chance within a range of 5% to 95% and then performs a probabilistic check using roll_chance to determine if the save is successful. The result indicates whether the character resists the effect, with higher save levels increasing the likelihood of success.

params.dis_level: The level of the effect or damage being resisted.
params.save_level: The character's saving throw level against the effect.

bool level_save(int dis_level, int save_.returns: A boolean value indicating whether the save was successful (true) or not (false).
bool level_save(int dis_level, int save_.name: level_save

bool saves_spell(int level, Character *v.brief: Determines whether a character successfully resists a spell based on various attributes and modifiers.
bool saves_spell(int level, Character *v.details: This function calculates the chance for a character (victim) to resist a spell of a given damage type at a specified spell level. It considers the character's level difference from the spell level, their saving attribute modifiers, presence of specific affects (such as berserk), and defense modifiers against the damage type. The resulting save chance is constrained between 5% and 95%, and a random roll determines if the spell is resisted successfully.

params.level: The level of the spell being cast.
params.victim: Pointer to the Character object who is the target of the spell.
params.dam_type: The damage type of the spell, used to calculate defense modifiers.

bool saves_spell(int level, Character *v.returns: A boolean value indicating whether the spell is successfully resisted (true) or not (false).
bool saves_spell(int level, Character *v.name: saves_spell

bool check_dispel_char(int dis_level, Ch.brief: Checks whether a specific affect can be dispelled from a victim character based on dispel level and saving throw.
bool check_dispel_char(int dis_level, Ch.details: This function attempts to dispel a specified affect type from the victim character by initializing a set of parameters and invoking affect iteration with dispel logic. It marks affects for removal if dispel conditions are met, removes marked affects, and if the affect is successfully dispelled, it sends appropriate messages to the room and the victim. The function returns true if the affect was dispelled, false otherwise.

params.dis_level: The level of the dispel attempt, influencing success chances.
params.victim: Pointer to the Character object from whom the affect is to be dispelled.
params.type: The affect::type enumeration value representing the specific affect to dispel.
params.save: Boolean indicating whether a saving throw is required for dispel success.

bool check_dispel_char(int dis_level, Ch.returns: A boolean value indicating whether the specified affect was successfully dispelled from the victim.
bool check_dispel_char(int dis_level, Ch.name: check_dispel_char
bool check_dispel_char(int dis_level, Ch.argsstring: (int dis_level, Character *victim, affect::type type, bool save)

bool check_dispel_obj(int dis_level, Obj.brief: Checks whether an object is affected by a specific dispellable affect and removes it if applicable.
bool check_dispel_obj(int dis_level, Obj.details: This function evaluates whether a particular affect of a given type on an object can be dispelled at a specified level. It initializes a set of parameters encapsulating the target object, dispel level, affect type, and save flag, then iterates over the object's affects to mark those that are dispellable based on the criteria. If any affects are marked for removal, they are subsequently removed from the object. The function returns true if any affects were dispelled, otherwise false.

params.dis_level: The level of the dispel attempt, influencing which affects can be dispelled.
params.obj: Pointer to the Object instance whose affects are to be checked and potentially dispelled.
params.type: The specific affect type to be checked for dispelling.
params.save: Boolean flag indicating whether saving throws or resistances should be considered during dispel.

bool check_dispel_obj(int dis_level, Obj.returns: A boolean value indicating whether any affects were successfully dispelled (true) or not (false).
bool check_dispel_obj(int dis_level, Obj.name: check_dispel_obj
bool check_dispel_obj(int dis_level, Obj.argsstring: (int dis_level, Object *obj, affect::type type, bool save)

bool undo_spell(int dis_level, Character.brief: Attempts to undo a specific affect of a given type on a character based on dispel level and saving throw.
bool undo_spell(int dis_level, Character.details: The function checks if the specified affect type can be undone by consulting the dispel table. If the affect type is eligible for undoing (can_undo is true), it proceeds to invoke check_dispel_char to attempt to dispel the affect from the victim character, considering the dispel level and whether a saving throw is required. If the affect type cannot be undone or is not present in the dispel table, the function returns false, indicating the undo attempt was unsuccessful.

params.dis_level: The level of the dispel attempt, influencing the chance of success.
params.victim: Pointer to the Character object from whom the affect is to be undone.
params.type: The affect::type enumeration value specifying which affect to attempt to undo.
params.save: Boolean indicating whether a saving throw is required for the dispel to succeed.

bool undo_spell(int dis_level, Character.returns: A boolean value indicating whether the undo attempt was successful (true) or not (false).
bool undo_spell(int dis_level, Character.name: undo_spell
bool undo_spell(int dis_level, Character.argsstring: (int dis_level, Character *victim, affect::type type, bool save)

bool dispel_char(Character *victim, int.brief: Attempts to dispel all affects of specified types from a victim character based on dispel level and cancellation status.
bool dispel_char(Character *victim, int.details: This function iterates through a predefined dispel table to identify and attempt to dispel applicable affects from the given victim character. The behavior depends on the 'cancellation' flag: if true, only affects that can be canceled are targeted; if false, only dispellable affects are considered. For each relevant affect, it invokes 'check_dispel_char' with the provided level and affect type, updating the return status if any affects are successfully dispelled. The function returns true if at least one affect was dispelled, otherwise false.

params.victim: Pointer to the Character object from whom affects are to be dispelled.
params.level: The dispel level influencing the success chance of dispelling affects.
params.cancellation: Boolean flag indicating whether the dispel is a cancellation attempt (true) or a standard dispel (false).

bool dispel_char(Character *victim, int.returns: A boolean value indicating whether at least one affect was successfully dispelled from the victim.
bool dispel_char(Character *victim, int.name: dispel_char
